findings.evidence: `Subcomodule.lean:218` defines `map` and `Subcomodule.lean:231-284` contains `map_toSubmodule`, `mem_map`, and other image lemmas; `Lattice.lean:282-284` proves `map_finite` by `rw [map_toSubmodule]; infer_instance`, with no use of joins.
findings.fix: Move `map_finite` next to the existing `Subcomodule.map` lemmas in `Subcomodule.lean`, or split image API into a dedicated `Subcomodule/Map.lean`; leave only join-dependent `map_sup`, `map_iSup`, and `map_finset_sup` in the lattice file.
findings.issue: `Subcomodule.map_finite` is image API, not lattice API: its proof only uses `map_toSubmodule` and `Module.Finite`, while the existing image API for subcomodules lives in `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcomodule.lean`.

summary: One image-finiteness lemma is placed in the lattice file even though it does not use lattice API and belongs with the existing subcomodule image API.
